qids.prose: Which of the following macros can put a macro assembler into an infinite loop? i. .MACRO M1, X .IF EQ, X ;if X=0 then M1 X + 1 .ENDC .IF NE, X ;if X O then .WORD X ;address (X) is stored here .ENDC .ENDM ii. .MACRO M2, X
